Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

fix(admin): CORS fix for auth-session + invite-code signup flow

Root cause: auth-session edge function CORS headers did not include
x-correlation-id, causing browser to block the preflight request.
This made fetchSessionInfo() fail silently on every login, clearing
the session and redirecting to /auth (blank screen bug).

Changes:
- Add x-correlation-id to CORS Access-Control-Allow-Headers in
  auth-session and admin-sign-in edge functions
- Add Sign Up tab to Auth page with invite code validation
- Create admin-signup edge function (validates invite code, creates
  user, adds to admin_allowlist + admin role, returns session)
- Create admin_invite_codes table in Supabase

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement full plan: enhanced cards, StatPearls, WJC, Randomize, localStorage Archive

What's New:
- Enhanced card format: source_summary_bullets, clinical_interpretation_bullets,
  sample_size, primary_outcome, limitations fields
- Renamed 'Trending' → 'Talking About' section
- Updated curation prompt: 5-10 cards/day, accuracy rules (source vs interpretation)
- Added CSS for new card fields (.wn-study-meta, .wn-bullets, .wn-interp-bullets)

Disease of the Day:
- Prompt now directs web search to StatPearls/NCBI Bookshelf first
- Accuracy rules: source-first extraction, no hallucinated statistics
- Displays "Read on StatPearls" link from content source_url field
- Randomize button: generates pool of 3 diseases per run, JS cycles between them
  without page reload (disease-view-0, disease-view-1, disease-view-2)
- Added randomizeDisease() JS function, .randomize-wrap + .statpearls-link CSS

Landmark Trial:
- WikiJournalClub scraping: tries acronym/name URL, falls back to training data
- Enhanced field set: clinical_question, intervention, comparator, strengths,
  weaknesses, practice_impact, why_it_matters_now (backward compat with old fields)
- Shows "Read on WikiJournalClub" link when WJC source found

Archive Tab:
- Fully client-side via localStorage (key: pdr-starred-v2)
- Star button saves structured card data (title, source, type, bottom line, URL)
- renderArchive() populates Archive tab from localStorage on page load
- Un-starring removes from archive immediately
- "Clear All Starred" button added
- No more server-side archive rotation (rotate_archive removed from main flow)
- Landmark tab "Starred Studies" list kept in sync

fix(redis): adiciona retry strategy com backoff exponencial no BullMQ

ETIMEDOUT repetidos spamavam os logs quando o Redis ficava fora.
Com o retryStrategy: 500ms → 1s → 2s → 4s → ... → cap 10s → 30s,
o número de tentativas cai drasticamente e os logs ficam limpos.

Também mascara credenciais no log do REDIS_URL e adiciona
connectTimeout: 10000 para evitar travamento no handshake.

commit.message:
Add automated Phase 1 warmup trigger and trade window UI lock

- trading-scheduler.mjs: Add warmup state tracking (warmupActive, warmupWindow,
  warmupStartedAt, warmupDoneToday). Add isTimeToWarmup() to fire Phase 1 warmup
  20 minutes before each scheduled window. Update status exports and add
  getWarmupStatus() for lightweight non-admin polling.

- live.mjs: Extend admin scheduler status with warmup fields. Add new
  GET /api/trading/lock-status endpoint (authenticated, non-admin) returning
  locked state and lockedModes for the current warmup window.

- DashboardPanel.tsx: Poll lock status every 30 seconds. Show amber warning
  banner when a trade window warmup is active. Disable Invest, Manage,
  Rebalance, and pending-sell cancel buttons for systems whose mode is locked
  (CC/CO/OC for close window; OO/CO/OC for open window).

- ForgeModelTab.tsx: Poll lock status every 30 seconds. Show amber warning
  banner and disable Save to Watchlist when the active bot's mode is locked.

commit.message:
opus-2026-03-06-S26: Irving-Omar framework + blue pair deep analysis

irving_omar_noncommuting.py:
- W(-z,-r) = W(z,r) at commutative level (even in (z,r) jointly)
- M[a,b] != H(a->b) (endpoint path count); fundamentally different objects
- Sherman-Morrison det ratio gives W change under single tile flip
- IO det/per uses cycle covers; transfer M uses paths (different combinatorics)

blue_pairs_deep_n5.py:
- Full blue pair map across 12 classes at n=5
- H(T)+H(flip(T)) NOT constant (ranges 10-30, mean 19.75)
- flip(T) is NOT T^op (only reverses non-path arcs)
- Self-flip pairs (class 8,10) have identical eigenvalue spectra
- 6 local minima, 8 local maxima on skeleton
- All maxima at H=15 (classes 9,11); unique minimum at H=1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch to NTLMv1 matching reference library (awo00/smb2)

Use DES-based LM/NT hashes via des.js instead of NTLMv2 HMAC-MD5.
Exact same flags, Type 3 layout, and key expansion as the working
reference implementation. If NTLMv1 also fails with USER_SESSION_DELETED,
the issue is in the SMB2 transport layer, not NTLM.

commit.message:
Add station-level cycle cache to deduplicate getTrainSchedule API calls

One getTrainSchedule call per unique origin station per 2-min cycle.
Multiple subscribers at the same station (or tracking trains from the
same origin) share one cached response instead of each making their own call.

Most impactful for evening trains — all subscribers board at NY Penn /
Hoboken, so one call serves all of them regardless of subscriber count.

Cache is cleared at the start of each check cycle via clear_cycle_cache().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix task confirmation card not showing in Ask Agent

Two bugs caused task confirmations to silently fail:
1. Chat route: needsConfirmation was false after @@TASK_CONFIRM@@ block
   was stripped, because remaining text didn't match the regex
2. Frontend hook: data.taskConfirm was completely ignored by useAskAgent

Fixes: force needsConfirmation=true when taskConfirm exists, store
taskConfirm in ChatMessage, and render TaskConfirmCard on both
desktop and mobile pages with task name/phase/assignee/dates/description.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement setMask return values, DefineLocal/DeclareLocal addProperty support

- MovieClip.setMask(): return undefined (no args), true (null/undefined removes mask),
  true/false based on whether the mask target resolves to a valid MC. Handles
  MOVIECLIP, STRING, and numeric argument types with colon-path conversion.

- DefineLocal at timeline level: check root MC's dynamic_props and MovieClip.prototype
  for addProperty setters before storing to var_array. If a setter is found, invoke it
  instead of storing directly (matches Flash's behavior where timeline scope is the clip).

- DeclareLocal at timeline level: check var_array, MC dynamic_props, and MovieClip.prototype
  for existing properties. If found, no-op. If not found, create as own property on MC's
  dynamic_props so hasOwnProperty returns true.

- GetVariable: upgrade dynamic_props check to use findPropertyStructWithPrototype for
  addProperty getter support. Add MovieClip.prototype fallback for prototype-level
  virtual properties.

- DefineLocal/DeclareLocal in with-scopes: check prototype chain for addProperty
  setters/existing properties (not just own properties).

Tests: define_local 27/27 PASS (was 0/27), movieclip_setmask 12/14 (was 2/14)

Add difficulty checks, GameSession extraction, and UI/logic separation

- Add pre-narrator difficulty checker (checker.js, checker.md) with 5-tier
  difficulty scale (1-99%). Engine rolls d100, narrator follows outcome.
- Extract GameSession class (session.js) — headless game state owner with
  no I/O or UI dependencies. Both game.js and playtest runner use it.
- Refactor game.js into thin terminal adapter over GameSession.
- Add rekeyEntity() to WorldState for aligning player ID with generated name.
- Add Cyrillic transliteration and Unicode diacritics stripping for non-Latin
  character names in ID generation, with hash fallback for unsupported scripts.
- Move strings.yaml into src/prompts/ alongside other prompt assets.
- Add direction translations (dir.north/south/east/west/up/down) for
  localized exit display.
- Remove 5 unnecessary Russian prompt translations — only narrator.md needs
  localization since all other prompts output JSON.
- Update playtest replay to show character description, checker info, and
  check results per turn.
- 327 tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix dialog scroll: remove overflow-y-auto from base DialogContent + persist auth in localStorage

Root cause of scroll issues: DialogContent base had overflow-y-auto which
prevented internal ScrollArea from working. Removed it from dialog.tsx base.
Forms with ScrollArea use overflow-hidden, ClientForm uses overflow-y-auto.

Also moved auth token from sessionStorage to localStorage so users stay
logged in after PWA service worker updates (New Version Available reload).

commit.message:
Improve markets display, paper trading, and trade settlement

- Paper trading now uses real Kalshi API for market scanning and settlement;
  paper_trading flag only gates whether orders are actually placed
- Added server-side 2-min cache and 10-page cap to prevent runaway market scans
- Increased frontend API timeout to 60s; markets poll every 2 min with Refresh button
- Markets tab rebuilt with per-card layout: probability bar, leg parsing for
  multi-leg combos, plain-English bet explanation, cost/profit/return stats
- History tab rebuilt with pending/settled sections, W/L summary, pulsing
  pending indicator, and real P&L once markets resolve
- Added settle_paper_trades() job that runs after each scan and checks
  Kalshi for market resolution to auto-settle paper trades with real outcomes
- Added get_market(ticker) to KalshiClient and get_unsettled_trades() /
  settle_trade() helpers to DB
